commit.message:
sync: portal redesign, CONNECT section, #00FF00 green, service updates

- wolf_live_chat: full portal redesign with pure #00FF00 green theme
- wolf_live_chat: replace RECON/ETLTV with CONNECT (direct game server join)
- wolf_live_chat: login screen, hub with COMMS/CONNECT/BRIEFING cards
- etlegacy_base: add etlegacy_port, nginx/TLS vars with placeholder defaults
- etlegacy_base: service adds +set net_port, server.cfg cleanup
- etlegacy_maps: add mapcycle.cfg.j2 template

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add MustStringSlice for required comma-separated env vars (#340)

MustStringSlice panics if the environment variable is unset or empty.
Intended for application startup.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add CIDR notation validator (#339)

CIDR validates that a string is valid CIDR notation using net.ParseCIDR.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: update README with latest utilities and descriptions (#338)

Update package descriptions to reflect recent additions: BasicAuth,
IP/IPv4, JSON, Base64, Unique, Map, Compact, Contains, NotModified,
SeeOther, ParseIDList, MustAddr, and more.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Contains for generic slice membership (#337)

Contains reports whether an item is present in a slice.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add NotModified and SeeOther helpers (#336)

NotModified sends a 304 response for ETag/cache workflows.
SeeOther sends a 303 redirect, used after POST to redirect to GET.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add IP and IPv4 address validators (#335)

IP validates any IPv4/IPv6 address. IPv4 validates strictly IPv4.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Compact for removing zero-value elements (#334)

Compact removes zero-value elements from a slice, returning a new
slice with only non-zero values in their original order.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add Base64 for RFC 4648 validation (#333)

Base64 validates that a string is valid standard base64 encoding.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: browser-side HTML parsing via CF Worker (no server scraping needed)

When NEXT_PUBLIC_CF_PROXY_URL + NEXT_PUBLIC_CF_PROXY_SECRET are set:
- Browser fetches HTML directly from CF Worker (CORS-enabled)
- DOMParser extracts title/price/images from HTML in the browser
  (__NEXT_DATA__ → JSON-LD → og:meta → CDN img tags, in order)
- Saves via /api/admin/scrape-meesho (same endpoint as bookmarklet)
- Falls back to server-side /api/admin/fetch-meesho if CF proxy not configured

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Map for generic slice transformation (#332)

Map applies a function to each element and returns the transformed
slice. Supports cross-type mapping (e.g., []int → []string).

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add BasicAuth for HTTP basic authentication (#331)

BasicAuth enforces HTTP Basic Authentication with constant-time
credential comparison using SHA-256 hashing to prevent timing attacks.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add ParseIDList for comma-separated UUID lists (#330)

ParseIDList parses a comma-separated query parameter as a list of
UUIDs, returning an error if any token is invalid.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add MustAddr for required address env vars (#329)

MustAddr panics if the environment variable is unset or not a valid
host:port address. Intended for application startup.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add JSON validator (#328)

JSON validates that a string is syntactically valid JSON using
encoding/json.Valid.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: self-hosted Cloudflare Worker proxy for Meesho fetching

Instead of paying for ScraperAPI, route through our own free CF Worker.
- cf-worker/worker.js: Cloudflare Worker that proxies Meesho requests
  (Cloudflare IPs not blocked by Akamai, free 100k req/day)
- fetch-meesho route: try CF proxy first (if CF_PROXY_URL + CF_PROXY_SECRET set)

Setup: deploy cf-worker/worker.js to Cloudflare Workers (free),
then add CF_PROXY_URL and CF_PROXY_SECRET to Vercel env vars.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Unique for generic duplicate removal (#327)

Unique returns a new slice with duplicates removed, preserving
the order of first occurrence.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(testkit): add RequireTrue and RequireFalse (fatal) (#326)

RequireTrue and RequireFalse are fatal boolean assertions that stop
the test immediately on failure, complementing the existing Assert*
boolean helpers.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Filter for generic slice filtering (#325)

Filter returns a new slice containing only elements matching a
predicate. Does not modify the original slice.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: replace broken proapi with ScraperAPI proxy + no-www URL attempt

- Add fetchViaScraperApi(): routes through residential IPs via ScraperAPI
  (set SCRAPER_API_KEY env var in Vercel for reliable URL-based import)
  Free tier: 1000 req/month at scraperapi.com
- Add no-www URL normalization in HTTP fetch: tries meesho.com before www.meesho.com
  (different Akamai configuration may allow it through)
- Extract shared extractFromHtml() helper to avoid code duplication
- Remove defunct proapi.meesho.com approach (it's a GCS bucket, not an API)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add ParseDateRange for start/end date params (#324)

ParseDateRange parses a pair of date query parameters and validates
that start is before end. Both parameters are optional.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add NotOneOf for blocklist validation (#323)

NotOneOf rejects values in a blocked list. Useful for reserved words,
banned usernames, or unsafe values.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add MapKeys for key transformation (#322)

MapKeys applies a transform function to every key in a string-keyed
map. Useful for normalizing header names, config keys, etc.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(security): add IsStrongPassword for complexity checks (#321)

IsStrongPassword validates minimum length, uppercase, lowercase,
digit, and special character requirements with human-readable errors.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add MustPort for required port env vars (#320)

MustPort panics if the env var is unset or not a valid TCP port
(1-65535). Intended for required config during application startup.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add CreatedWithLocation for 201 + Location header (#319)

CreatedWithLocation sends a 201 JSON response with a Location header
pointing to the newly created resource URI.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: bookmarklet uses DOM scraping (no re-fetch), promote as primary import method

- Bookmarklet now reads from already-loaded DOM instead of re-fetching HTML
  (the re-fetch was also blocked by Akamai; DOM is already rendered in browser)
- Added price extraction via leaf-node walk + JSON-LD fallback
- Improved image extraction to handle .webp/.png with quality upgrade
- Admin UI redesigned: bookmarklet is now the primary flow (3 clear steps)
- Auto-import demoted to secondary 'try anyway' option with honest disclaimer
- Removed showBookmarkletFallback state (no longer conditional)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(testkit): add AssertBetween for inclusive range checks (#318)

AssertBetween[V cmp.Ordered] asserts a value is within an inclusive
range [lo, hi]. Works with any ordered type (int, float, string).

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(httpclient): add Head method for HEAD requests (#317)

Head sends an HTTP HEAD request, useful for checking resource existence,
cache validation, and retrieving response headers without body.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: update README with new utilities from cycles 207-226 (#316)

Document GetOrSet, Contains, EachString, Lowercase, Uppercase,
StartsWith, EndsWith, CSPHeader, CamelToSnake, SnakeToCamel,
Compress, RealIP, ContentType, Enum, MustEnum, MustURL,
RandomString, AssertWithin, OptionalQueryBool, RequireHeader,
Delay, and XML in their respective package sections.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add StartsWith and EndsWith validators (#315)

StartsWith validates a string has the given prefix; EndsWith validates
the given suffix. Useful for path and file extension validation.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add Meesho proapi approach to bypass Akamai block on Vercel

Try proapi.meesho.com (Android app API) before falling back to HTTP/Playwright.
proapi uses lighter bot-protection than www.meesho.com which blocks Vercel IPs via Akamai.
Tries 3 known proapi endpoints with okhttp Android app headers.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(retry): add Delay for backoff calculation without sleeping (#314)

Delay calculates the exponential backoff delay for a given attempt,
useful for logging, metrics, or custom retry loops.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add ContentType for media type enforcement (#313)

ContentType rejects POST/PUT/PATCH requests whose Content-Type is not
in the allowed set, responding with 415 Unsupported Media Type.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add MustURL for required URL env vars (#312)

MustURL panics if the env var is unset or is not a valid HTTP/HTTPS
URL. Intended for required config during application startup.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add RequireHeader for mandatory headers (#311)

RequireHeader extracts a required HTTP header, returning an error if
the header is missing or contains only whitespace.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add Lowercase and Uppercase validators (#310)

Lowercase rejects strings containing uppercase letters; Uppercase
rejects strings containing lowercase letters. Both allow digits
and punctuation.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add RealIP to normalize client IP (#309)

RealIP extracts the client IP from X-Forwarded-For, X-Real-IP, or
RemoteAddr and sets X-Real-IP on the request for downstream handlers.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add XML for XML response rendering (#307)

XML encodes data as XML with an XML declaration header and sets the
Content-Type to application/xml; charset=utf-8.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add SnakeToCamel for case conversion (#306)

SnakeToCamel converts snake_case to camelCase. Handles consecutive
underscores and mixed-case input by lowercasing all segments.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(security): add CSPHeader builder for Content-Security-Policy (#304)

CSPHeader builds a deterministic CSP header value from a map of
directives. Keys are sorted alphabetically for reproducible output.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add OptionalQueryBool for tri-state booleans (#303)

OptionalQueryBool returns *bool: nil when absent, true/false when
present. Accepts true/1/yes and false/0/no (case-insensitive).

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add MustEnum for required constrained values (#302)

MustEnum panics if the env var is unset or not one of the allowed
values. Intended for required config during application startup.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(testkit): add AssertWithin for duration bounds (#301)

AssertWithin asserts a duration is at most a given max. Useful for
verifying timeouts, latency bounds, and retry back-off windows.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add CamelToSnake for case conversion (#300)

CamelToSnake converts camelCase/PascalCase to snake_case. Handles
consecutive uppercase acronyms like HTTPClient → http_client.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add Enum for constrained string values (#299)

Enum validates that an env var's value is among a set of allowed
choices. Returns default when unset. Comparison is case-sensitive.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cache): add Contains for key existence checks (#298)

Contains reports whether a key exists without updating LRU order.
Expired entries are evicted on access, matching Get behavior.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add EachString for slice element validation (#297)

EachString applies a string validator to every element, returning the
first error with field[i] context. Works with any (field, value) validator.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cache): add GetOrSet for atomic cache-miss-fill (#296)

GetOrSet returns the cached value if present, otherwise calls a fill
function, stores the result, and returns it. Useful for lazy loading.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

wolf_live_chat: login screen design improvements

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: update README with new utilities and middleware (#295)

Document new validators (Alphanumeric, Numeric, Hex, Between),
sanitize helpers (EscapeHTML, Truncate, NormalizeWhitespace,
RemoveNonPrintable), security helpers (RedactURL, SanitizeFilename),
config helpers (Addr, Bytes, Port, URL, StringSliceRequired),
middleware (HSTS, ETag, CacheControl, AllowMethods), response
helpers (Stream, Download, SSE), testkit assertions (AssertGreater,
AssertLess, AssertHasPrefix, AssertHasSuffix, AssertMapHasKey).

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add NormalizeWhitespace for collapsing spaces (#294)

NormalizeWhitespace collapses consecutive whitespace into single
spaces and trims edges. Useful for names, titles, and search queries.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(retry): add WithTimeout for deadline-bounded retries (#293)

WithTimeout wraps Do with a context.WithTimeout so the entire retry
sequence is bounded by a total elapsed time.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

wolf_live_chat: server-side Bearer token auth, favicon, title update, root-based censor

- POST /chat/login validates password, returns HMAC-SHA256 token
- GET /chat/api requires Authorization: Bearer token (enforced in Python)
- chat.py binds to 127.0.0.1 only, removed Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
- Password removed from HTML source entirely
- Added ET:Legacy favicon
- Header: ET:LEGACY CZ - CHAT, login screen: ET:LEGACY CZ
- Censor refactored to root-based bad words list (shorter, better coverage)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add ETag for automatic cache validation (#291)

ETag computes a weak ETag from the response body SHA-256 hash and
returns 304 Not Modified when the client's If-None-Match matches.
Only applies to successful GET/HEAD responses.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add Bytes for byte-size env var parsing (#290)

Bytes parses human-readable byte sizes (e.g. 512KB, 64MB, 2GB) from
environment variables. Supports B, KB, MB, GB, TB suffixes.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(security): add SanitizeFilename against path traversal (#289)

SanitizeFilename strips directory paths, backslashes, dot-dot
sequences, and null bytes from filenames to prevent directory
traversal attacks on uploaded files.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(testkit): add AssertMapHasKey and AssertMapNotHasKey (#288)

Generic map key assertions for any comparable key type.
Useful for verifying response headers, config maps, and caches.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add OptionalQueryFloat for float query parameters (#287)

OptionalQueryFloat reads a float64 query parameter with a default
fallback. Invalid values silently return the default.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add AllowMethods for HTTP method restriction (#286)

AllowMethods rejects requests with disallowed HTTP methods, returning
405 with an Allow header listing the permitted methods.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add RemoveNonPrintable for control char stripping (#285)

RemoveNonPrintable strips control characters and non-printable runes
while preserving spaces, tabs, and newlines. Safe for Unicode text.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add Between for inclusive range validation (#284)

Between[V] validates that a value falls within [min, max] inclusive.
Generic over any cmp.Ordered type (int, float64, string, etc.).

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: c8ctl docs (#8089)

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: aleksander-dytko <102789122+aleksander-dytko@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Veronika Zvarych <122369346+giorgionaps@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Veronika Zvarych - Ext <veronika.zvarych-ext@camunda.com>

repository.name: camunda-docs
repository.description: Camunda 8 Documentation, including all components and features

commit.message:
feat(crypto): add HashSHA256 for hex-encoded SHA-256 hashing (#283)

HashSHA256 returns the hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of a byte slice.
Useful for checksums, ETags, and content-addressable storage keys.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add StringSliceRequired for mandatory list env vars (#282)

StringSliceRequired reads a comma-separated environment variable
and returns an error if the variable is unset or has no valid entries.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add Download for file download responses (#281)

Download sets Content-Disposition attachment header and streams an
io.Reader as a file download with the given content type and filename.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(testkit): add AssertHasPrefix and AssertHasSuffix (#280)

String prefix and suffix assertions for more readable test checks
on paths, URLs, error messages, and generated identifiers.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add CacheControl for response caching headers (#279)

CacheControl sets Cache-Control with public/private visibility and
max-age duration. Useful for static assets and cacheable API responses.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add ParseJSONBody[T] generic JSON body decoder (#278)

ParseJSONBody reads and decodes a JSON request body into a typed value
with a 1 MB size limit. Returns the decoded struct and any error.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Truncate for rune-safe string truncation (#277)

Truncate shortens strings to at most maxLen runes, appending an
ellipsis character when truncated. Safe for Unicode text.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(security): add RedactURL to strip credentials from URLs (#276)

RedactURL removes userinfo (username:password) from URL strings to
prevent credential leakage in logs and error messages.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add Numeric for digit-only string validation (#275)

Numeric validates that a value contains only ASCII digits (0-9).
Useful for ZIP codes, PINs, and numeric reference codes stored as strings.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add ClientIP for extracting client IP address (#274)

ClientIP checks X-Forwarded-For (first entry), then X-Real-IP, then
falls back to RemoteAddr with the port stripped.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add Addr for host:port address env vars (#273)

Addr reads and validates a host:port address from an environment
variable using net.SplitHostPort. Validates port range 1-65535.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add Stream for io.Reader responses (#272)

Stream writes an io.Reader to the response with given content type,
useful for file downloads, CSV exports, and large payloads.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add EscapeHTML for safe HTML entity escaping (#271)

EscapeHTML escapes <, >, &, ' and " characters using html.EscapeString.
Useful for embedding user input in HTML content without injection risk.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(testkit): add AssertGreater and AssertLess for ordered comparisons (#270)

Generic assertions for any cmp.Ordered type (int, float64, string, etc.).
8 tests covering pass/fail for both, plus string ordering.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add Alphanumeric for letter-and-digit validation (#268)

Alphanumeric rejects values containing anything other than ASCII
letters and digits. Useful for codes, reference IDs, and usernames.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add Port for validated TCP port env vars (#267)

Port(key, default) reads a port number and validates it is between
1 and 65535. Returns a descriptive error for invalid values.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add HSTS for Strict-Transport-Security header (#266)

HSTS(maxAge, includeSubDomains) middleware sets the
Strict-Transport-Security header to enforce HTTPS connections.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add NoWhitespace for identifiers and API keys (#265)

NoWhitespace rejects values containing spaces, tabs, newlines, or
carriage returns. Useful for usernames, API keys, and other
identifiers that must be a single token.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: update README with new utilities and middleware (#264)

Document recently added helpers: request.ExtractBearerToken,
request.IsJSON, security.MaskEmail, sanitize.Slugify,
sanitize.TrimStrings, middleware.SecureHeaders, NoCache, MaxBody,
Timeout, and Chain. Update middleware stack example.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(security): add MaskEmail for safe email logging (#263)

MaskEmail keeps the first character and domain of an email address,
replacing the rest of the local part with asterisks. Useful for
audit logs and error messages.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add Int64 and MustInt64 for large integer env vars (#262)

Int64 reads a 64-bit integer with a default fallback. MustInt64
panics if the variable is unset or not a valid int64. Useful for
database IDs, timestamps, and file sizes.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(sanitize): add Slugify for URL-friendly slug generation (#261)

Slugify lowercases the string, replaces non-alphanumeric characters
with hyphens, collapses consecutive hyphens, and trims edge hyphens.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(request): add ContentType and IsJSON helpers (#260)

ContentType extracts the media type from the Content-Type header,
stripping parameters. IsJSON is a convenience check for
application/json.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(middleware): add NoCache for cache-prevention headers (#259)

NoCache sets Cache-Control, Pragma, and Expires headers to prevent
browsers and proxies from caching API responses.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(validation): add ExactLength for fixed-format field validation (#258)

ExactLength validates that a value is exactly n characters after
trimming. Useful for ISO codes, PINs, and other fixed-width fields.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add HTML helper for HTML responses (#257)

HTML(w, code, body) sets Content-Type to text/html and writes the
body string. Companion to the Text helper for non-JSON responses.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(config): add URL helper for validated URL environment variables (#256)

URL(key, default) reads and validates that the env var is a
well-formed absolute URL with http or https scheme and a host.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update Dockerfile

header, returning the token and a boolean indicating presence.

repository.name: d2-linter
repository.description: GitHub Action that lints D2 declarative diagram files using the official d2 toolchain.

commit.message:
feat(sanitize): add TrimStrings to trim and filter string slices (#254)

TrimStrings trims whitespace from each element and omits empty
strings. Useful for cleaning user-supplied comma-separated inputs.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs(cache): add examples for Len and Clear (#253)

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(response): add Text helper for plain-text responses (#252)

Text(w, code, body) sets Content-Type to text/plain and writes the
given string body. Useful for health checks, simple status endpoints,
and non-JSON APIs.

Co-authored-by: devaloi <166653705+devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
